context_text: <A> this went into effect a couple of months ago the mayor of new york really hates smoking and so he got this law passed and you know i understand that you know but you'd think should get an exception for god sakes / <B> mhm / <A> if you're smoking marlboro cigarettes you should be able to ah smoke them in the company in the headquarters of the company that makes them / <B> yeah / <A> and let's see what else have we got here overeating to me is not i don't know it's a personal sin it's your problem / <B> huh-oh / <A> i've done it but you know i don't think it's a terrible personal habit unless { you're } / <B> [ really ]
